'''shafufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wharfholder|wharfholder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wharfholder|wharfholder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shafufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæfifith|shæfifith]] || [[word:shæfifij|shæfifij]] || [[word:shæfifish|shæfifish]] || [[word:shæfifi|shæfifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shafufufuth|shafufufuth]] || [[word:shafufufuj|shafufufuj]] || [[word:shafufufush|shafufufush]] || [[word:shafufufu|shafufufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shafufuth|shafufuth]] || [[word:shafufuj|shafufuj]] || [[word:shafufush|shafufush]] || [[word:shafufu|shafufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shafuffuth|shafuffuth]] || [[word:shafuffuj|shafuffuj]] || [[word:shafuffush|shafuffush]] || [[word:shafuffuf|shafuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shafufuthu|shafufuthu]] || [[word:shafufuju|shafufuju]] || [[word:shafufushu|shafufushu]] || [[word:shafufuku|shafufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shafufuth|shafufuth]] || [[word:shafufuj|shafufuj]] || [[word:shafufush|shafufush]] || [[word:shafufu|shafufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shafufuthul|shafufuthul]] || [[word:shafufujul|shafufujul]] || [[word:shafufushul|shafufushul]] || [[word:shafufukul|shafufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shafufuthuthu|shafufuthuthu]] || [[word:shafufujuju|shafufujuju]] || [[word:shafufushushu|shafufushushu]] || [[word:shafufuku|shafufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shafufuthun|shafufuthun]] || [[word:shafufujun|shafufujun]] || [[word:shafufushun|shafufushun]] || [[word:shafufukun|shafufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shafufuthuoro|shafufuthuoro]] || [[word:shafufujuoro|shafufujuoro]] || [[word:shafufushuoro|shafufushuoro]] || [[word:shafufukuoro|shafufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
